title: oryzopsis henryi
intro: Oryzopsis henryi, also known as Henry's Rice Grass or Chinese Rice Grass, is a perennial plant species native to the mountainous regions of China. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Oryzopsis henryi include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and supporting respiratory health. The plant is often prepared as a tea or infused in water to be consumed, or used in combination with other herbs in traditional Chinese medicine.
